text: Found and fixed a real shim mismatch: Breeze cholesky/eigSym validate non-empty square symmetry at 1e-7 before LAPACK, while Gale native kernels intentionally read the lower triangle. Added reusable matrix-RHS LU/QR shims, rank/condition overlap parity, adversarial failure/layout/special-value tests, and the explicit equivalence matrix. Focused parity 10/10 and interop 23/23 green.
